foundryvtt-auth-keepalive.notification.e: Your login session expired. Click the dialog to re-authenticate, then return to this tab — Foundry will keep running.
foundryvtt-auth-keepalive.dialog.title: Login session expired
foundryvtt-auth-keepalive.dialog.body: Your single sign-on session expired while this tab was open. Click the button below to re-authenticate in a new tab, then return here — Foundry will keep running and this dialog will close automatically once the session is restored.
foundryvtt-auth-keepalive.settings.inter: How often to ping the keepalive endpoint to keep the SSO session cookie warm. Default 240000 (4 minutes). Values below 30000 are ignored.
foundryvtt-auth-keepalive.settings.pingP: Path or URL the keepalive ping hits. Default /api/status. Use a same-origin path so the session cookie is sent.
foundryvtt-auth-keepalive.settings.reaut: URL the dialog opens when the session expires. Leave empty to use the Authentik outpost start endpoint with the current page as the return URL.
foundryvtt-auth-keepalive.settings.first: Delay after the world is ready before the first keepalive probe runs. Default 5000.
foundryvtt-auth-keepalive.settings.showR: Show an informational toast when a previously-expired session is restored.
